# Asset Register

## Reusable Assets

| Asset | Source | Type | Reuse Target | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Asset Types

- Product pattern
- Starter module
- Template
- Checklist
- Offer
- Case study
- Research note
- Automation workflow

## Promotion Criteria

- Repeated use or strong evidence.
- Clear owner and scope.
- Documented limitations.
- Verification or example exists.
